description_long: This object consists of a group of three potted plants arranged closely together, each in a smooth, white, cylindrical ceramic pot. The largest plant features long, upright, sword-like green leaves, resembling a Sansevieria or snake plant. Adjacent to it is a smaller pot containing a compact, upright succulent with thick, ribbed leaves, likely a type of Haworthia or Gasteria. The third and smallest pot contains a round, ribbed cactus with a dark green body and a small black decorative element or flower on top, supported by short wooden legs. The pots are plain and unadorned, with a clean, modern aesthetic. The overall arrangement suggests a decorative grouping suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A trio of modern white ceramic pots containing a tall snake plant, a ribbed succulent, and a small round cactus, arranged as a decorative group.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall snake plant in the largest pot, with the ribbed succulent and round cactus visible behind and to the side.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ribbed succulent in the middle and the small cactus in the foreground, with the snake plant leaves partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view with the round cactus and its wooden-legged pot most prominent, the snake plant leaves rising behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the snake plant leaves and the arrangement of all three pots, with the cactus and succulent to the left.
